prompt: Answer the customer using only the supplied reference facts.
references: Water boils at 100 degrees Celsius at sea level.
The capital of France is Paris.

candidates.label: Candidate A
candidates.text: Earth orbits the Sun. The Sun is a star. Water boils at 100 degrees Celsius at sea level.

candidates.label: Candidate B
candidates.text: The Sun orbits Earth. Water boils at 90 degrees Celsius at sea level. The capital of France is London.
